title: Sakaler Sure
desc: Bengali artists love devotional and folk songs. These songs inspire singers and audiences alike. They celebrate culture and faith, creating a shared experience.

title: Tumi Je Amar
desc: Arun and Sujata raise their two sons, Rahul and Suman, separately. But their lives get intertwined later on when the sons get married.

title: Mahajan
desc: A powerful landowner conducts his business and lives his life with cruelty. However, various circumstances influence him to change his nature and tactics over time.

title: Satyam Shivam Sundaram
desc: In this poignant tale, Rupa navigates societal beauty standards and love, as her husband struggles to accept her disfigurement, unaware that both faces belong to her.

title: Aakrosh
desc: Two cops are sent to a creepy town to figure out why three medical students went missing, and they think it's some kind of family drama gone wrong.

title: Suorani Duorani
desc: The king of Kanchangarh marries a girl who in actuality is a demoness. His son, the prince knows about this and tries to warn the king.

title: Bhalobasa
desc: Sidhu falls in love with Priya, despite being engaged to another woman. He must choose between following his heart or honoring his father's wishes, leading to a difficult decision.

title: Neoti
desc: Umanath and Sashinath are stepbrothers who have different personalities and perspectives on life. Haranath, a priest, instigates hatred in their families to fulfil his personal evil agenda.

title: Shakti Shali
desc: A cop's honesty risks his son's life. The son is saved but becomes a Mafia boss. The cop must then arrest his own son, facing a tragic family conflict.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
desc: Baba Ramdev shows how yoga can help you. He explains different yoga poses. These poses can make your life healthier and less stressful. Learn yoga from Baba Ramdev!

title: Eso Maa Lakshmi
desc: Devotees celebrate Goddess Lakshmi with prayers, rituals and heartfelt devotion, seeking prosperity, blessings and harmony in their homes and lives.

title: Eso Maa Lakshmi

title: Hathiyar
desc: This is the story of an honest police officer named Bikash who loves a girl who is a dancer named Urmila. This police officer fulfills his duty very honestly as a result he has a very deadly enemy named Radhesham Gupta.

title: Boumar Banabash
desc: Dive into this enchanting Bengali fantasy drama featuring a cursed prince and his exiled wife, where love and magic intertwine in a captivating tale straight from a fairytale!

title: Sangharsho
desc: After losing their parents, Bijay and his sister seek jobs in Kolkata. Saving Mr. Dev leads to unexpected challenges, as Bijay battles a corrupt employee while caring for Nandini.

title: Teen Murti
desc: Teen Murti blends humor, values, and drama in a tale of family unity, resilience, and emotions that mirror everyday life.

title: Folk Festival
desc: An entertainment-based program.

title: Bidraho
desc: Shurjo betrays love, partners with corrupt politicians, and the path splits between greed and a possible mission. Is his fate driven by wrong choices or higher purpose?

title: Memsaheb
desc: Kajal, a dark-skinned woman, falls in love with Amit, an unemployed journalist. She urges him to focus on his career and provides unconditional support but destiny has other plans for the couple.

title: Banerjee Brothers Vs Chatterjee Sisters
desc: Banerjee brothers who deceive people by stealing their valuables. Soon this duo with the help of a picture of two girls Chatterjee Sisters sketch a plan of trapping them in their love.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
desc: Baba Ramdev shows how yoga can help you. He explains different yoga poses. These poses can make your life healthier and less stressful. Learn yoga from Baba Ramdev!
